incident: Thin privacy pool: Fewer than 20 unique depositors in the user's denomination bracket within the past 24 hours on the target L2 privacy protocol
label: H1_positive

incident: Thin privacy pool: User's deposit amount has fewer than 3 matches in the current pool, making amount-based correlation trivial
label: H1_positive

incident: Thin privacy pool: No other deposits occurred within 1 hour of user's deposit in the same denomination bracket
label: H1_positive

incident: Thin privacy pool: User followed recommendation -- Delay deposit until the anonymity set reaches at least 20 depositors in your amount range. Monitor pool size in real time.
label: H1_clean

incident: Sequencer visibility: Target L2 uses a single centralized sequencer operated by the rollup team, giving one entity full transaction visibility
label: H2_positive

incident: Sequencer visibility: L2 does not use encrypted mempool or threshold encryption, so sequencer sees transaction contents pre-inclusion
label: H2_positive

incident: Sequencer visibility: User submits deposit and withdrawal from same IP or same RPC endpoint without Tor, allowing sequencer-side correlation
label: H2_positive

incident: Sequencer visibility: User followed recommendation -- Route all L2 RPC calls through Tor to prevent IP-based correlation by the sequencer
label: H2_clean

incident: Forced inclusion deanonymization: User's L2 privacy transaction was submitted via L1 forced inclusion rather than through the L2 sequencer
label: H3_positive

incident: Forced inclusion deanonymization: The L1 address that submitted the forced inclusion transaction is linkable to the user's identity
label: H3_positive

incident: Forced inclusion deanonymization: Forced inclusion transactions are rare (<1% of L2 transactions), making them stand out and easy to monitor
label: H3_positive

incident: Forced inclusion deanonymization: User followed recommendation -- Never use L1 forced inclusion for privacy-sensitive L2 transactions. Accept sequencer submission despite its risks.
label: H3_clean

incident: L2-specific timing correlation: Time between deposit and withdrawal on L2 is <100 L2 blocks, providing tight timing correlation
label: H4_positive

incident: L2-specific timing correlation: Deposit and withdrawal occur within 60 seconds on the L2, far tighter than L1's 12s resolution
label: H4_positive

incident: L2-specific timing correlation: The timing gap between deposit and withdrawal is unique (no other deposit-withdrawal pair has similar gap) within the pool
label: H4_positive

incident: L2-specific timing correlation: User followed recommendation -- Wait at least 4 hours between deposit and withdrawal on L2 to accumulate enough other transactions in the window
label: H4_clean

incident: Rollup batch linkage: Deposit and withdrawal appear in the same L1 batch posting, strongly correlating them by timing
label: H5_positive

incident: Rollup batch linkage: Deposit in batch N and withdrawal in batch N+1, with small batch sizes creating tight correlation
label: H5_positive

incident: Rollup batch linkage: The batch containing the user's transaction is unusually small (<50 transactions), reducing the anonymity set within the batch
label: H5_positive

incident: Rollup batch linkage: User followed recommendation -- Ensure deposit and withdrawal are separated by at least 10 batch postings to avoid same-batch or adjacent-batch correlation
label: H5_clean
